AI SDR ChatbotQualify Leads 24/7

Deploy an intelligent AI chatbot on your website that engages visitors, qualifies leads, and syncs with your CRM. Get it live in as little as 2 weeks.

Get AI Chatbot Demo

What Our AI Chatbot Does

More than just a FAQ bot. Our AI SDR chatbot actively engages visitors and converts them into qualified leads.

GPT-4 Powered

Uses latest GPT-4 model for natural, context-aware conversations that feel human.

Lead Qualification

Automatically asks qualifying questions and scores leads based on your criteria.

CRM Sync

Seamlessly adds qualified leads to your CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive) in real-time.

24/7 Engagement

Never miss a lead. Your AI works around the clock, even when your team is offline.

Analytics Dashboard

Track conversations, conversion rates, and lead quality with our analytics panel.

Human Handoff

Automatically escalates high-intent leads to your sales team via Slack/email.

Seamless Integrations

Connects with your existing tools

HubSpot
Salesforce
Pipedrive
Slack
Mailchimp
Zapier

Deployment Process

1

Discovery Call

We learn about your business, ICP, and qualify criteria.

2

Bot Design

We craft conversation flows and train the AI on your knowledge base.

3

Integration Setup

Connect to your website, CRM, and notification systems.

4

Testing

Test conversations with real scenarios, refine responses.

5

Launch

Deploy to your website and train your team on management.

Ready to Automate Lead Qualification?

Book a demo and see how our AI SDR chatbot can transform your lead generation. Deployment in as little as 2 weeks.
